paragraphs: Anthropic just shipped scheduled tasks for Claude Code and the internet is losing it.
Here are 3 ways I'm actually using it:
Every morning at 8am, Claude reads my Slack channels and project notes, summarizes everything, and sends me a Telegram digest.
I wake up knowing exactly what happened overnight.
Every day at noon, Claude checks competitor posts, trending topics, and niche news — then cross-references it with my content pillars.
I get 10 fresh content ideas without lifting a finger.
Every Friday, Claude pulls my social media metrics, ad performance, and revenue data — analyzes it all and generates a PDF report.
Ready to share with my team before the weekend.
I built a full video breaking down how each of these works and how to set them up in Claude Code.
Comment "SCHEDULED" and I'll send it over.
